productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Blue Dial Analog Watch
description: Style NoteCheck out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.  Product DetailsCase style: Yellow and blue plastic round case with fancy bezelDial style: Light blue and green dial with yellow hands and cartoon print on the dialStrap style: Yellow plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Branding on the 9 hour mark and screw to reset time  Waterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 20 mm  Case thickness: 6 mm
